dsl_rule.translation_notes: Broadening Top pattern entry conditions translated to detect higher highs and lower lows with expanding volume. The five-point structure (3 highs, 2 lows) cannot be directly encoded in a single bar rule without complex state tracking, so conditions focus on progressive widening. Exit uses reversal signal (price crossing above SMA) as author provided AUTHOR_SILENT for exits. Expected decline of 15% per author; success rate 53% in bear markets.

source_rule_text: Broadening Top: A reversal pattern with higher highs and lower lows as price action widens over time, composed of five turning points (three minor highs and two minor lows in orthodox form)
